data.body: LANDING in FFO-contention treadmill: PS10 PASSED CI green (code validated). main advanced repeatedly (auto-lander f1fa draining its queue); my stack rebased server-side 'on behalf of owner' -> PS11 on affa55be7. main now STABLE at affa55be7. PS11 CI QUEUED (heavy GHA runner backlog from auto-lander contention; setup jobs pass, test jobs waiting for runners). No code issue — pure infra wait. Autosubmit label NOT voted on my stack (auto-lander not driving it) -> I submit manually on green. Epic CLOSED+SIGNED, all 7 stories closed. Only remaining: atomic submit of 581 (lands all 8) once PS11 CI green + main stable. Will submit immediately on green.
